{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323183309F08DA6521F096807924A\"}"},"total":2913},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7507196862761272126","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者思维太严谨了，查询了很多历史。从各种事件影响，相互关联，写的真好！！！作者肯定是个三国游戏迷，大概率三国志战略版或者率土之滨，希望作者去做策划","text_exts":[{"e":55,"s":52,"text":"三国志","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E5%BF%97\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742619896807924A%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227507196862761272126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227365706763250699289%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E5%BF%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"},{"e":64,"s":60,"text":"率土之滨","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E7%8E%87%E5%9C%9F%E4%B9%8B%E6%BB%A8\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742619896807924A%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227507196862761272126%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227365706763250699289%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%87%E5%9C%9F%E4%B9%8B%E6%BB%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747910529,"group_id":"7365706763250699289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+SYDOIbuntMtBURgcmpJwo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-no
